Video.summary: Emeril and young chef CJ Calhoun make a meal any kid would love!
Video.title: with CJ Calhoun, Dominique Taylor

Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril shows you how easy it is to make fresh pasta at home.
Video.title: Homemade Pasta

Video.summary: Emeril and food critic Ian McNulty make classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Ian McNulty

Video.summary: Emeril shares some of his favorite mushroom recipes.
Video.title: Wild Mushrooms

Video.summary: Emeril and Chef Shermond Esteen prepare brunch dishes.
Video.title: with Shermond Esteen

Video.summary: Emeril and Abita CEO Dave Blossman enjoy a beer-centric menu.
Video.title: with Dave Blossman

Video.summary: Emeril whips up Big Freedia's favorite southern meal.
Video.title: with Big Freedia

Video.summary: Any time of year is a great time for a cookout! Join Emeril for grilled rack of lamb with mixed-herb pesto and a side of grilled potatoes with feta
Video.title: Grill It Up!

Video.summary: Emeril is going back to the basics. Whether you're a novice cook or an advanced chef, you'll love these recipes: vegetable soup, and roast chicken served with roasted root vegetables
Video.title: Back to Basics: Cooking School 101

Video.summary: Tomato and Potato Tart, Potato Gnocchi with Gorgonzola Sauce, Andouille Potato Cakes, Crispy Sea Bass with Confit of Yukon Gold Potatoes, Pancetta and Sweet Peas In Chicago
Video.title: Potatoes (In Chicago)

Video.summary: Pickled Beets, Marble Rye, Beef Pastrami, Homemade Thousand Island Spread, Emeril's Open-Face Reuben
Video.title: Emeril's Deli

Video.summary: Sweet Potato Crab Chowder, New Potato Lobster Chowder, Sweet Bay Scallop Chowder
Video.title: New Wave Chowders

Video.summary: Vichyssoise, Asparagus Crab Soup, Fruit Soup
Video.title: Spring Soups

Video.summary: Pastrami Sandwich, Curing Pastrami, Duck Pastrami and Pasta
Video.title: Pastrami

Video.summary: Salmon and Mashed Potato Pie, Natchitoches Meat Pie, Scallop Pie
Video.title: Savory Pies

Video.summary: Herb Vinaigrette, Herb-Steamed Oyster Mushrooms, Herb-Crusted Scallops
Video.title: Herbs

Video.summary: What can you cook when there's nothing in the pantry? Emeril shares recipes that require minimal ingredients: vegetable frittata, easy fettuccine with bacon and peas, and roasted garlic soup.
Video.title: What to Cook When There's Nothing in the Pantry

Image.alt: What to Cook When There's Nothing in the Pantry
What to Cook When There's Nothing in the Pantry
What to Cook When There's Nothing in the Pantry

Video.summary: Emeril prepares "kicked-up" sandwiches with the Radio City Rockettes: spicy eggplant with mozzarella and basil, porchetta with dandelion greens, and Elvis Presley-inspired peanut butter and banana
Video.title: Kicked-Up Sandwiches

Video.summary: Emeril recreates some of his restaurant's best dishes with his son EJ Lagasse and Johnny Slamon.
Video.title: with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse

Image.alt: with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse
with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse
with Johnny Slamon and EJ Lagasse

Video.summary: Emeril shares his burger favorites: buffalo burgers with bacon, cheese, and fresh thyme and Emeril's turkey burgers with cilantro mayonnaise
Video.title: Hamburger 101

Video.summary: Parsnip Cakes with Smoked Trout, Apple and Horseradish Cream, Root Cellar Gratin, Venison Medallions with Celery Root-Pear Puree, Sweet Potato Spice Cake
Video.title: The Root Cellar

Video.summary: Emeril shows the most useful kitchen equipment: quick and easy stir-fried squid with chili sauce and sirloin steak fajitas
Video.title: Which Pan is for What?

Video.summary: Skate Wing with Grenoble Sauce, Monkfish Court Bouillon, Mousse of Pike with Lobster Salad, Cornmeal-Crusted Lemon Fish with Potato Lyonnaise and Crab Meat Ravigote
Video.title: Uncommon Fish

Video.summary: Spinach Salad with Nut-Crusted Goat Cheese, Trout Almondine, Pistachio-Crusted Rack of Lamb with Mashed Potatoes and Peasant-Style Sauce, Macadamia Nut Tart
Video.title: Going Nuts

Video.summary: Pea Soup, Deep-Dish Meat Pie, Sugar Pie
Video.title: French Canadian Cuisine

Video.summary: Turkey Bolognese, Duck and Sausage Etouffee, Emeril's Chicken Pot Pies
Video.title: Home Cookin'

Video.summary: Vodka and Citrus Cured Salmon, Mini Open-Faced Corn Cake and Salmon Salad Sandwiches, Funky Southwestern Turkey, Rhubarb and Apple Pie with Walnut Crumb Topping
Video.title: Prime Time Emeril

Video.summary: Caldo Verde, Salt Cod, Onions and Potatoes, Tripe O'Porto Style
Video.title: Food of Porto (Portugal)

Video.summary: Pimento and Bacon Clams, Salt Cod and Lobster Cakes with Roasted Corn Relish and Classic Tartar Sauce, Blueberry Jam and Custard Pie
Video.title: New England Fare

Video.summary: A hearty dinner spread with pork roast, mashed potatoes and angel food cake.
Video.title: Sunday Dinners

Video.summary: English Fish and Chips, Beer-Brined Chicken with Giblet Gravy, Beer-Braised Cabbage and Celery Root, Guinness Ice Cream
Video.title: Cooking with Beer

Video.summary: Jillie's Pesto Dip; Marinated Mushroom Salad; Alden's Grandmother's Meat and Potato Casserole; Jessie's Big Chocolate Chip Cookies
Video.title: Our Family Traditions

Video.summary: Make delicious Asian dishes with Emeril's recipes: chicken and veggie stir-fry with cellophane noodles, beef and soba noodle stir-fry, and cold-noodle salad with honey-sesame dressing and peanuts
Video.title: Asian Noodles
